channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Three iPhone 17 model dummy units appear in a hands-on video leak
item.description: Thanks to some dummy units, we've got another look at the iPhone 17 designs – and some key dimensions.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Billions of cherished photos at risk; only a third of Americans back up their precious pics to the cloud
item.description: Americans take billions of photos, yet only a small fraction make it into printed albums, risking future loss.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Trump hosts crypto leaders at White House summit
item.description: The cryptocurrency industry flocked to Washington on Friday for the White House’s first-ever crypto summit, where President Trump and his Cabinet made clear the “war on crypto” is over in Washington.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Musk's SpaceX confirms Starlink lease agreement with FAA
item.description: SpaceX confirmed Wednesday that it is leasing Starlink kits and service to the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) for free but denied any push to take over Verizon’s contract to build an updated communications system for the agency.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: AMD's new driver adds AFMF 2.1 support for improved frame generation - and it could be a game-changer for handheld gaming PCs
item.description: FSR 4 might be incredible for RDNA 4 GPU users, but AMD's new AFMF 2.1 could be just as exciting for handheld gamers.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 8 obstacles women still face when seeking a leadership role in IT
item.description: If you are a tech leader, you might encourage your daughter to follow your path, imagining a journey, like yours, with challenges that can be overcome with hard work. But if you are a man — especially a white man — you are likely unaware of the massive obstacles she will face that you didn’t.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Gig Companies are backing Trump’s Labor Secretary nominee. Here’s what that means for workers
item.description: The trade association representing America’s largest gig companies is backing President Trump’s nominees to lead the Department of Labor—an endorsement that could shape the future of worker classification in the gig economy.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The Social Security Administration Bans Reading "General News" Websites at Work | The Hill
item.description: The Social Security Administration (SSA) has banned reading 'general news' websites at work, citing a focus on mission-critical tasks and serving the American people.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: AI chatbots infected with Russian disinformation: Study
item.description: The world’s most popular artificial intelligence (AI) chatbots are infected with Russian disinformation, according to a study published Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Achieving unified visibility for effective zero trust implementation
item.description: All components of a zero trust architecture must generate data that is observable, available and able to be correlated within a unified data plane. The post Achieving unified visibility for effective zero trust implementation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Tim Scott unveils bill targeting debanking
item.description: Senate Banking Committee Chair Tim Scott (R-S.C.) unveiled legislation Thursday taking aim at debanking.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Trump says he will 'probably' extend TikTok ban deadline if deal isn't reached in time
item.description: President Trump on Thursday suggested he would consider extending the deadline for a ban on TikTok for a second time if a deal isn't reached, stating there is "a lot of interest" in the video-sharing platform.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: The Trump administration just cut Defense Department grants that research terrorism and drug trafficking
item.description: Researchers in a highly regarded Department of Defense program called the Minerva Research Initiative recently received word that grants already awarded by the Defense Department are being terminated, potentially putting their work—and in some cases even paychecks for their students and lab staff—in
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Data center vacancies hit historic lows despite record construction
item.description: Space supply in major data center markets increased by 34% year-over-year to 6,922.6 megawatts, considerable growth over the 26% increase in 2023 , according to CBRE research.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: MWC25: KSA accelerates digital transformation with Huawei-Zain partnership
item.description: In a landmark move for Saudi Arabia’s digital economy, Huawei Cloud and Zain KSA have announced a strategic partnership to accelerate cloud adoption and digital transformation across industries.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How Trump's tariffs could pinch the tech sector
item.description: The tech industry is set to feel the pinch as the Trump administration levies new tariffs against key U.S. trading partners.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Trump calls CHIPS Act ‘horrible,’ wants to defund it
item.description: In his address to Congress last night, President Donald J. Trump called the CHIPS Act “horrible,” and said whatever money hasn’t been spent should now be used to reduce the national debt. The CHIPS Act, enacted into law in 2022 under then-President Joseph R. Biden Jr.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Luxury glass trailer unfolds into a spacious home in just 15 minutes
item.description: Expandable's Touchdown is a designer trailer that promises a luxury off-grid living experience and unfolds into a home in about 15 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Authorities use high tech to enhance border security
item.description: Surveillance cameras and drones give border officials an advantage; but the challenge of data-sharing silos remains.
item.dc:creator: Ali Bradley, NewsNation

item.title: Tariffs for now won’t impact IT organizations
item.description: The impact of tariffs by the Trump Administration on semiconductors from Taiwan is so far not cause for alarm, according to one analyst.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
